steps.t: Drenghól can be found in Elderslade. You should journey to Drenghól.
Drenghól can be found in Elderslade. You should talk to Zádokh Flint-eye at Drenghól.
The dwarves at Drenghól have asked you to scout the forces gathered near the outer walls of Gundabad. You should assist the dwarves at Drenghól.
